case_title: JENS CORPORATION vs. ROBINSON, ERIC et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT ROBINSON, ERIC ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JENS CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT ROBINSON, ERIC DOES ONE THROUGH FIVE, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF JENS CORPORATION COURT TRIAL SET FOR NOV-15-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 03 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROBINSON, ERIC THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 575 O'FARRELL STREET #302, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA $734.95 RENT, $350.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,309.95, LEASE FORFEITED

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ROBINSON, ERIC

DEPT 03. JUDGE TOMAR MASON. CSR: MARILYN NORMAN. CLERK: G. SHULL. C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. ALL PARTIES PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT. PLTFF PRESENTED PRIMA FACIE CASE. COURT ORDERS JUDGMENT FOR PLTFF AND AGAINST DEFENDANT. PLTFF SUBMITS PREPARED JUDGMENT. EXHIBITS ARE WITHDRAWN AND RETURNED TO PLTFF.
